options.delta_label_convention: Delta labels (25DC, 25DP, 10DC, 10DP) refer to the BASE currency, USD. 25DC = 25-delta USD call (CNH put); 25DP = 25-delta USD put (CNH call). Slight positive 25d RR (25DC above 25DP) reflects persistent CNH depreciation risk premium relative to managed band.
options.liquid_strikes: ATM through 25D most liquid; 10D strikes are indicative
options.illiquidity_note: Vol market is less liquid than G10; spreads widen significantly beyond 1Y

notes: CNH rates are below USD rates (PBOC manages rates lower to support growth)
Negative carry for long USD reflects USD rate advantage vs CNH HIBOR
Forward points are negative (USD at discount); carry cost is real but modest

market_structure.skew_driver: PBOC band management suppresses vol; topside USD skew reflects depreciation risk on PBOC fixings
market_structure.liquidity_profile: reasonable in core tenors; offshore market (CNH vs CNY); spreads wider than G10

risk_notes: PBOC fixing: daily USD/CNY central parity fixing is the dominant risk; CNH tracks closely but can gap
Capital controls: CNH is offshore renminbi — convertible, but PBOC can tighten access suddenly
Trade war risk: USD/CNH is a direct expression of US-China trade tensions; gap risk on tariff announcements
Vol suppression: PBOC actively intervenes to cap vol; realised vol often far below implied
CNH vs CNY basis: spread between offshore (CNH) and onshore (CNY) can widen sharply in stress
